title.en: The Access Network Reference Model: One Map for Every IEEE 802 Network
title.zh: 接入网参考模型：用一张图描述所有 IEEE 802 网络

blocks.en: Clause 5 of IEEE Std 802.1CF-2019 hands you a single, reusable blueprint — the Network Reference Model (NRM) — that fits any IEEE 802 access network, whether it is a home Wi-Fi box or a factory floor. The big idea (5.1 Introduction): the NRM describes only the link-layer (data link, DL) plumbing between the network-layer interface in a terminal and the network-layer interface in an access router. A terminal connects over a wired or wireless link to a node of attachment (NA) — a generic name for an access point, a base station, or a bridge. Traffic from many NAs is aggregated and carried by the backhaul to an access router (AR), which ends the layer-2 connection and forwards by IP address. A subscription service (SS) authenticates the terminal and authorizes the right connectivity. Throughout, IEEE 802 networks forward by medium access control (MAC) address, and MAC addresses name the link endpoints.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1CF-2019 的第 5 章给了你一张可复用的蓝图——网络参考模型（NRM）——它能套用于任何 IEEE 802 接入网，无论是家里的 Wi-Fi 路由器还是工厂车间。核心思想（5.1 引言）：NRM 只描述链路层（数据链路层，DL）的“管线”，即从终端中的网络层接口到接入路由器中的网络层接口之间。终端通过有线或无线链路连接到一个接入节点（NA）——它是接入点、基站或网桥的统称。来自多个 NA 的流量被汇聚，并由回程（backhaul）送往接入路由器（AR），AR 终结二层连接并按 IP 地址转发。订阅服务（SS）负责对终端进行认证，并授权合适的连接。整个体系中，IEEE 802 网络都按介质访问控制（MAC）地址转发，MAC 地址标识链路的端点。

blocks.en: Two foundations make the model precise (5.2 Basic architectural concepts and terms; 5.3 Overview). The terms come straight from the OSI layered model and the MAC Service definition (IEEE Std 802.1AC). The NRM (5.3.1) is a generic foundation that can span multiple interfaces, technologies, and subscriptions, embracing software-defined networking (SDN) principles. Its first sketch (5.3.2 Schematic overview) has five players — terminal, access network, network management system (NMS), access router, subscription service — wired together by labelled reference points R1, R2, R3, R4, R11, R12. Crucially, two kinds of reference point exist (5.3.3): a control interface (drawn dashed) carries layer-management information, usually over IP protocols such as SNMP, RADIUS, or NETCONF; a datapath interface (drawn solid) carries user data inside layer-2 frames.
blocks.zh: 两个基础让模型变得精确（5.2 基本架构概念与术语；5.3 概述）。术语直接来自 OSI 分层模型和 MAC 服务定义（IEEE Std 802.1AC）。NRM（5.3.1）是一个通用基础，可以跨越多个接口、多种技术和多个订阅，并采纳软件定义网络（SDN）的理念。它的初稿（5.3.2 示意概览）有五个角色——终端、接入网、网络管理系统（NMS）、接入路由器、订阅服务——通过带标号的参考点 R1、R2、R3、R4、R11、R12 连接起来。关键在于存在两类参考点（5.3.3）：控制接口（用虚线表示）承载层管理信息，通常走 SNMP、RADIUS 或 NETCONF 等 IP 协议；数据通路接口（用实线表示）则在二层帧内承载用户数据。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  TE[Terminal TE] -- R1 --> AN[Access Network]
  TE -. R2 .-> SS[Subscription Service]
  AN -- R3 --> AR[Access Router]
  AN -. R4 .-> SS
  AN -. R11 .-> NMS[Network Mgmt System]
  SS -. R12 .-> AR
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  TE[终端 TE] -- R1 --> AN[接入网]
  TE -. R2 .-> SS[订阅服务]
  AN -- R3 --> AR[接入路由器]
  AN -. R4 .-> SS
  AN -. R11 .-> NMS[网络管理系统]
  SS -. R12 .-> AR

blocks.en: The Basic NRM (5.4) names five entities and gives each its own control brain, in the SDN spirit. The terminal (TE, 5.4.2.1) holds a terminal interface (TEI) for the link and may run terminal control (TEC). The access network (AN, 5.4.2.2) holds the NAs and backhaul and runs access network control (ANC). The access router (AR, 5.4.2.3) ends layer-2 connectivity and may run access router control (ARC). The subscription service (SS, 5.4.2.4) does authentication, authorization, and accounting plus user policy, often via a subscriber database; multiple SSs can interlink for roaming. The network management system (NMS, 5.4.2.5) lets the operator configure, monitor, and fault-fix the network elements (NEs) — the boxes that forward user data. New reference points appear here (5.4.3): R8 is the logical control link between ANC and TEC (riding over R1); R9 is the logical control link between ANC and ARC (riding over R3); R1, R3 are datapaths; R2, R4, R11, R12 are control links.
blocks.zh: 基本 NRM（5.4）命名了五个实体，并按 SDN 思想给每个实体一个独立的控制“大脑”。终端（TE，5.4.2.1）拥有用于链路的终端接口（TEI），并可运行终端控制（TEC）。接入网（AN，5.4.2.2）包含 NA 和回程，并运行接入网控制（ANC）。接入路由器（AR，5.4.2.3）终结二层连接，并可运行接入路由器控制（ARC）。订阅服务（SS，5.4.2.4）负责认证、授权与计费以及用户策略，通常借助订阅者数据库；多个 SS 可互联以支持漫游。网络管理系统（NMS，5.4.2.5）让运营商对网络单元（NE，即转发用户数据的设备）进行配置、监控和故障修复。这里出现了新的参考点（5.4.3）：R8 是 ANC 与 TEC 之间的逻辑控制链路（承载在 R1 上）；R9 是 ANC 与 ARC 之间的逻辑控制链路（承载在 R3 上）；R1、R3 是数据通路；R2、R4、R11、R12 是控制链路。

blocks.en: A handy mnemonic for the reference points: solid lines (R1, R3, R6) move user data; dashed lines (R2, R4, R5, R7, R8, R9, R10, R11, R12) move control and management information. When a line 'rides over' another, it means the control conversation is tunnelled inside the datapath frames of the lower interface — for example, R8 (ANC to TEC) travels over R1.
blocks.zh: 记忆参考点的小窍门：实线（R1、R3、R6）传输用户数据；虚线（R2、R4、R5、R7、R8、R9、R10、R11、R12）传输控制与管理信息。当一条线“承载在”另一条线上时，意味着该控制会话被封装在下层接口的数据通路帧内——例如，R8（ANC 到 TEC）通过 R1 传输。

blocks.en: Two refinements widen the lens. The NRM with coordination and information service (CIS, 5.5) adds one optional entity (5.5.2.1): the CIS coordinates shared resources — spectrum management, coexistence, mobility information — across access networks, reached by the new reference point R10 between ANC and CIS (5.5.3). R10 can run directly between two ANCs (a distributed CIS) or to a central third party; both styles may coexist. The Comprehensive NRM (5.6) then opens up the access network itself (5.6.1), splitting it into the NA (5.6.2.1) — the element giving the physical link to the terminal — and the backhaul (BH, 5.6.2.2) — the aggregation-and-forwarding fabric to the AR. Three internal reference points appear (5.6.3): R5 is control-only configuration of the NA, R6 is the physical port between NA and backhaul, R7 controls the backhaul's data plane. Finally, 5.6.4 offers a compact abbreviation form (TE, AN, AR, NA, BH, ANC, TEC, ARC, etc.) for crowded diagrams.
blocks.zh: 两次细化拓宽了视野。带协调与信息服务（CIS，5.5）的 NRM 增加了一个可选实体（5.5.2.1）：CIS 跨多个接入网协调共享资源——频谱管理、共存、移动性信息——通过 ANC 与 CIS 之间的新参考点 R10 连接（5.5.3）。R10 可直接连接两个 ANC（分布式 CIS），也可连接到中央第三方；两种方式可以并存。综合 NRM（5.6）则打开接入网内部（5.6.1），将其拆分为 NA（5.6.2.1，提供到终端物理链路的单元）和回程（BH，5.6.2.2，通往 AR 的汇聚转发结构）。出现了三个内部参考点（5.6.3）：R5 是 NA 的纯控制配置，R6 是 NA 与回程之间的物理端口，R7 控制回程的数据面。最后，5.6.4 提供了一种紧凑的缩写表示法（TE、AN、AR、NA、BH、ANC、TEC、ARC 等），便于在拥挤的图中使用。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="8" y="55" width="70" height="40"/><text x="43" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">TE</text><rect x="120" y="30" width="60" height="40"/><text x="150" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">NA</text><rect x="120" y="85" width="60" height="40"/><text x="150" y="109" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">BH</text><rect x="230" y="55" width="60" height="40"/><text x="260" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">ANC</text><rect x="360" y="55" width="70" height="40"/><text x="395" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">AR</text><line x1="78" y1="60" x2="120" y2="50"/><text x="95" y="48" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">R1</text><line x1="150" y1="70" x2="150" y2="85"/><text x="155" y="82" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">R6</text><line x1="180" y1="105" x2="360" y2="80"/><text x="270" y="105" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">R3</text><line x1="230" y1="65" x2="180" y2="50" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><text x="205" y="48" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">R5</text><line x1="260" y1="95" x2="180" y2="110" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><text x="215" y="112" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">R7</text></svg>

caption.en: Comprehensive NRM, simplified: the access network opens into a node of attachment (NA) and backhaul (BH) governed by access network control (ANC). Solid = datapath (R1, R6, R3); dashed = control (R5, R7).
caption.zh: 综合 NRM 简化图：接入网展开为接入节点（NA）和回程（BH），由接入网控制（ANC）治理。实线为数据通路（R1、R6、R3），虚线为控制（R5、R7）。

blocks.en: Two clauses make the model deployable in the real world. Operational roles (5.7) keep ownership out of the technical model: the same boxes can belong to a User, an Access Network Operator (running NMS and CIS), a Service Provider (owning the SS), or an IP Provider (owning the AR) — and deployments may merge these, as when one ISP plays both Service Provider and IP Provider. Identifiers (5.8) catalogue the names every entity carries, in three tables: access-technology-dependent IDs (TE-ID, NA-ID, AN-ID — e.g. a Wi-Fi NA-ID is the BSSID, an AN-ID is the SSID/HESSID); technology-independent IDs (NMS-ID, ANC-ID, AR-ID, BH-ID, SUS-ID, CIS-ID, mostly fully qualified domain names or 48-bit addresses); and role IDs (User-ID, SP-ID, SUB-ID, ANO-ID, IP-ID, INF-ID, using company IDs, domain names, or network access identifiers).
blocks.zh: 两个子条款让模型可落地。运营角色（5.7）把所有权排除在技术模型之外：同样的设备可以归属于用户、接入网运营商（运行 NMS 和 CIS）、服务提供商（拥有 SS）或 IP 提供商（拥有 AR）——而实际部署可能合并这些角色，比如一家 ISP 同时扮演服务提供商和 IP 提供商。标识符（5.8）用三张表登记每个实体携带的名称：依赖接入技术的 ID（TE-ID、NA-ID、AN-ID——例如 Wi-Fi 的 NA-ID 就是 BSSID，AN-ID 就是 SSID/HESSID）；与技术无关的 ID（NMS-ID、ANC-ID、AR-ID、BH-ID、SUS-ID、CIS-ID，多为全限定域名或 48 位地址）；以及角色 ID（User-ID、SP-ID、SUB-ID、ANO-ID、IP-ID、INF-ID，使用公司 ID、域名或网络接入标识符）。

blocks.en: Network virtualization (5.9) lets one set of hardware host several independent access networks. The general idea (5.9.1): IEEE 802 distinguishes virtual networks — multiple layer-2 forwarding domains such as IEEE 802.1Q VLANs or IEEE 802.11 virtual access points each with its own SSID — from virtualized access networks, full instances each with their own ANC and NMS; the CIS is the one entity shared across instances. The basic assumptions (5.9.2): a virtualized access network exposes exactly the same reference-point behaviour as a physical one, so the terminal need not know; an orchestrator over the access infrastructure assigns and adjusts resources, feeding configuration to the ANC through the CIS. Its life cycle (5.9.3): the operator sends an instantiation request with a template to the infrastructure provider, which reserves resources via the orchestrator; the instance then initialises, serves terminals, can request more resources during runtime, and is finally torn down. Multi-instance design (5.9.4) shows three networks on one infrastructure, each with its own R10 to the common CIS, requesting PHY-parameter and resource changes that the orchestrator grants only when they do not collide.
blocks.zh: 网络虚拟化（5.9）让一套硬件承载多个相互独立的接入网。总体思想（5.9.1）：IEEE 802 区分虚拟网络（多个二层转发域，如 IEEE 802.1Q VLAN，或各有自己 SSID 的 IEEE 802.11 虚拟接入点）与虚拟化接入网（完整实例，各有自己的 ANC 和 NMS）；CIS 是唯一在各实例间共享的实体。基本假设（5.9.2）：虚拟化接入网在参考点上表现得与物理网络完全一致，因此终端无需感知；接入基础设施之上的编排器（orchestrator）分配并调整资源，并通过 CIS 向 ANC 提供配置。其生命周期（5.9.3）：运营商带着模板向基础设施提供商发送实例化请求，后者通过编排器预留资源；实例随后初始化、服务终端、可在运行期间请求更多资源，最终被拆除。多实例设计（5.9.4）展示了同一基础设施上的三个网络，每个都有自己通向公共 CIS 的 R10，请求 PHY 参数和资源变更，编排器仅在请求互不冲突时才批准。

summary.en: Coverage map: the nine deployment scenarios of 5.10 (every clause number)
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：5.10 的九个部署场景（逐一对应条款号）

blocks.en: 5.10.1 Introduction frames 5.10.2 through 5.10.9 as non-exhaustive examples showing the NRM fits real IEEE 802 networks. 5.10.2 WLAN router: a single residential box (Ethernet uplink to a DSL/cable modem, a router with DHCP/NAT/firewall, an Ethernet bridge, and one-or-more IEEE 802.11 radios) collapses every NRM entity into one device, exposing few external reference points; it acts as AR to the LAN and as TE to the WAN. 5.10.3 Home network: a home gateway integrates AR plus access network — a wired device sees it as a full AN, a wireless device reaches it through an access point that is the NA while the gateway is backhaul-plus-ANC; the management platform is the NMS. 5.10.4 Enterprise network: access points and Ethernet ports are NAs, the bridging fabric is the backhaul, a WLAN controller is the ANC, the network-management station and directory are NMS and SS; R6, R3, R5, R4, R11, R12 map cleanly, and Cloud-hosted ANC/NMS/SS still fit. 5.10.5 Enterprise with multiple bridging domains: VLANs (IEEE 802.1Q) carve multiple broadcast domains from one infrastructure under one set of control entities — the NRM needs no new entities, only added attributes on the control interfaces; each terminal is mapped to one VLAN at the NA. 5.10.6 Industrial network: robots, cameras, and mobile terminals connect via wired access bridges and wireless access points (both NAs) over an Ethernet backhaul to a gateway/AR feeding Cloud servers, with time-sensitive scheduling protecting low-latency traffic. 5.10.7 Public hotspot: an open or 802.1X-secured WLAN with a captive portal, access points as NAs, a bridge as backhaul, a WLAN controller as ANC, an authentication center as SS (with a RADIUS proxy to roaming partners), supporting Passpoint online sign-up. 5.10.8 Virtualized WLAN for in-building IoT: a second access-point instance on residential CPE forms a virtualized NA on a separate datapath and control plane, delivered by the ISP as 'WLAN as a Service' so an IoT service provider runs an isolated network with its own NMS/SS/AR while only PHY settings (e.g. radio channel) stay with the infrastructure owner — a concrete realisation of 5.9. 5.10.9 Fog deployment: Fog computing nodes are the terminals, backhaul aggregates links among Fog nodes and to the Cloud behind the AR, and a Fog control-and-orchestration entity plays the SS, giving distributed edge computing a managed, defined-service-level access network.
blocks.zh: 5.10.1 引言将 5.10.2 至 5.10.9 定位为非穷尽的示例，证明 NRM 适配真实的 IEEE 802 网络。5.10.2 WLAN 路由器：一台住宅设备（以太网上行连 DSL/线缆调制解调器、带 DHCP/NAT/防火墙的路由、以太网桥、一个或多个 IEEE 802.11 射频）把所有 NRM 实体压缩进一台设备，对外暴露很少的参考点；它对 LAN 侧充当 AR，对 WAN 侧充当 TE。5.10.3 家庭网络：家庭网关整合 AR 与接入网——有线设备视其为完整的 AN，无线设备通过作为 NA 的接入点接入，而网关充当回程加 ANC；管理平台即 NMS。5.10.4 企业网：接入点和以太网端口是 NA，桥接结构是回程，WLAN 控制器是 ANC，网络管理站和目录服务分别是 NMS 与 SS；R6、R3、R5、R4、R11、R12 清晰对应，云端托管的 ANC/NMS/SS 同样适配。5.10.5 多桥接域企业网：VLAN（IEEE 802.1Q）在一套基础设施上划分出多个广播域，且共用一套控制实体——NRM 无需新增实体，只需在控制接口上增加属性；每个终端在 NA 处映射到一个 VLAN。5.10.6 工业网：机器人、摄像头和移动终端通过有线接入桥和无线接入点（均为 NA），经以太网回程连到网关/AR，再接入云服务器，并以时间敏感调度保护低时延流量。5.10.7 公共热点：开放或经 802.1X 加密的 WLAN，配有强制门户（captive portal），接入点为 NA、网桥为回程、WLAN 控制器为 ANC、认证中心为 SS（通过 RADIUS 代理对接漫游伙伴），支持 Passpoint 在线注册。5.10.8 面向楼宇内 IoT 的虚拟化 WLAN：在住宅 CPE 上新建第二个接入点实例，在独立的数据通路与控制面上形成虚拟化 NA，由 ISP 以“WLAN 即服务”交付，使 IoT 服务提供商运营一张隔离网络，拥有自己的 NMS/SS/AR，而仅 PHY 设置（如射频信道）保留在基础设施所有者手中——这是 5.9 的具体实现。5.10.9 雾部署：雾计算节点即终端，回程在雾节点之间以及雾节点与 AR 后端的云之间汇聚链路，雾控制与编排实体扮演 SS，为分布式边缘计算提供一张受管理、有明确服务等级的接入网。

blocks.en: The single most useful skill from Clause 5 is the mapping move: take any real network, then label each box with its NRM role (NA, BH, ANC, AR, SS, NMS) and each wire with its reference point (R1-R12). Every scenario in 5.10 is just that exercise repeated — once you can do it, you are fluent in the standard.
blocks.zh: 第 5 章最实用的一项技能是“映射”动作：拿来任意一张真实网络，给每个设备贴上它的 NRM 角色标签（NA、BH、ANC、AR、SS、NMS），给每条连线贴上参考点标签（R1–R12）。5.10 中的每个场景不过是这个练习的重复——一旦你会做，就算精通了这部标准。

cites.note: 5.1 Introduction, 5.2 concepts/terms, 5.3 overview (general, schematic, reference point types)
5.4 Basic NRM (entities TE/AN/AR/SS/NMS, reference points R1-R12, R8/R9)
5.5 NRM with CIS (R10), 5.6 Comprehensive NRM (NA, BH, R5/R6/R7, abbreviations)
5.9 Network virtualization (general, assumptions, life cycle, multi-instance)
